news.t: Tortoise Capital Launches the Tortoise MLP ETF (TMLP), Delivering Modern, Tax-Efficient Access to 100% MLP Exposure

holdings.infoBox: TMLP is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are TORTOISE MLP TOTAL RETURN INDEX SWAP GS-L stock at 50.90%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 48.22%, Hess Midstream LP at 5.71%, The Williams Companies at 5.55%, and Targa Resources at 5.35%.

overview.description: The Tortoise MLP ETF (TMLP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Tortoise MLP index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of energy master limited partnerships (MLPs), primarily through total return swaps. TMLP was launched on Dec 23, 2025 and is issued by Tortoise.

data.title: Tortoise Capital Launches the Tortoise MLP ETF (TMLP), Delivering Modern, Tax-Efficient Access to 100% MLP Exposure
data.text: OVERLAND PARK, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tortoise Capital launches TMLP ETF, draws on decades of experience to provide exposure to MLPs without compromises of legacy products.
